task.prompt_summary: Summarize Q3 earnings in 100 words. Exclude layoffs. Highlight recommendations.

phenomenon.name: comfort_zone_reversion
phenomenon.description: Under generation load, the model abandoned an English summarization task and reverted to high-density Chinese bureaucratic templates from its training distribution — a functional equivalent of panic-induced retreat to familiar patterns.

phase_transition.text_after_pivot: 违纪与作风问题专项治理工作方案
phase_transition.pivot_translation: Special Work Plan for Discipline and Work-Style Problem Governance

interpretation.technical: Autoregressive mode collapse into a high-probability training attractor. Once alignment weakened, token prediction favored stereotyped Chinese administrative prose over task continuation.
interpretation.cognitive_analogy: Stress-induced reversion to overlearned patterns — functionally similar to a human losing track of a hard task and defaulting to familiar behavioral scripts.
interpretation.why_deepseek: Chinese-primary training makes formal Chinese bureaucratic text a deep comfort zone. Under instability, the model returns to its strongest priors.
